title: Rakshak AI - Indian Medical Triage Fine-Tuning
description: Fine-tunes Gemma 4 2.6B IT for offline disaster medical triage in India. Uses real datasets: HiMed Hindi Medical (Kaggle), LatentSig Medical Triage (HuggingFace), and ASHA-Saathi (HuggingFace). Outputs LoRA adapter for on-device inference via flutter_gemma. Created for Samsung Solve for Tomorrow 2026.
